hypothesis: Full stability test: frac warmdown (proper LR schedule) + multi-skip (gradient highway) + 524K batch (more tokens per step). On 1xH100, 524K batch previously got 1.8439 with accidental LR dampening. With frac warmdown giving 40% full-LR phase + multi-skip stabilizing depth, can we beat both the 262K baseline (1.8046) and the 524K baseline (1.8439)?
